summary: Twelve military equipment targets assessed, all confirmed with NO DAMAGE; all are armored vehicles in motion, kicking up dust, with no visible deformations, holes, scorching, or missing components. The scene depicts a large formation of armored vehicles moving across an arid, dusty terrain under a partly cloudy sky, generating significant dust clouds as they advance. The consistent operational status of all assessed targets suggests the formation is actively maneuvering without combat damage or mechanical failure.
